title: RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: NEWPORT REGIONAL OFFICE RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with rent, including back rent, and security deposits. Funding is limited and not guaranteed. Agency does not provide emergency shelter or motel vouchers. 120 NE Avery Street 2nd Floor Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Individuals at risk of eviction or who are homeless and need assistance to move into permanent housing Hours: Phone:Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Walk in: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 574-2280 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 265-8505 Main phone Main phone (541) 574-2280 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or walk in to be screened for eligibility FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Eviction or late rent notice if currently housed AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Walking distance from bus stop. Behind Starbucks and Quiznos. Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEWPORT REGIONAL OFFICE
